title: tragacantha lanigera
intro: Tragacantha lanigera, also known as the hairy goat's-thorn, is a type of shrub or small tree belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Tragacantha lanigera include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Tragacantha lanigera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues.
